creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
I get the following warning now:

> $ python3 -m gwh /usr/local/ldadocgen/etc/gwh.json
/usr/local/lib/python3.7/site-packages/requests/__init__.py:114: RequestsDependencyWarning: urllib3 (1.26.13) or chardet (None)/charset_normalizer (3.0.1) doesn't match a supported version!

Until a new py-requests release is made, one needs to apply this one-off patch: https://github.com/psf/requests/commit/c57f1f0ca10e61771b459c857182c23626607312
